standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode

approved_boundary_notice.reason: Amsterdam processitems exposes explicit interval sources for Beademen non-invasief and CPAP. These are narrow enough to approve as same-name noninvasive ventilation active when invasive ventilation, HFNC, oxygen-only devices, and tracheostomy status remain separate.

database_mapping.source_grain: one Amsterdam processitems noninvasive ventilation or CPAP interval row
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive noninvasive ventilation state episode row after merging overlapping same-variable source intervals within the stay

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patientid joined from Amsterdam admissions_core by admissionid
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: not separately available in the current Amsterdam opening mapping
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: raw admissionid is the Amsterdam ICU/MC local admission identifier and normalizes to stay_id under ICU/MC semantics

adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents NIV/CPAP positive pressure support. Invasive ventilation, oxygen-only delivery, HFNC, and tracheostomy status are not source-expanded into the output.

state_episode_build_translation.positive_state_translation: retain Amsterdam processitems rows with itemid 10740 or 9671 and merge overlapping retained source intervals within the same stay
state_episode_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use source start as Amsterdam relative support_starttime in milliseconds while also emitting relative_start_time_value in minutes
state_episode_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use source stop as Amsterdam relative support_endtime in milliseconds while also emitting relative_end_time_value in minutes
state_episode_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge overlapping same-variable 10740/9671 intervals; do not union invasive ventilation, HFNC, supplemental oxygen, or tracheostomy rows into this asset
state_episode_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive approved NIV/CPAP episode under this source rule

validation_contract.positive_only_no_row_policy_check: false rows are not emitted; absence of row is not universal proof of no noninvasive ventilation
validation_contract.source_code_lock_rule: all retained rows must originate from Amsterdam processitems itemid 10740 or 9671
notes: This Amsterdam mapping is reviewed-approved for std_noninvasive_ventilation_active.
The approved source scope is NIV/CPAP from processitems intervals.
Oxygen-only devices and tracheostomy status remain separate candidate or sibling variables.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: Formal Amsterdam same-name output is approved only through the governed execution.py path reading this approved mapping spec and producing runtime plus rerun evidence.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading an approved mapping spec and producing runtime plus rerun evidence.
